title: Blue Cobs
description: A simple smooth blue cobs texture pack thats used for PvP, YouTube Recordings, Live Streaming on platforms such as YouTube or Twitch, playing on your survival world and being able to see cobwebs properly despite it being snowy or in a snow biome .
body: A simple smooth blue cobs texture pack thats used for PvP, YouTube Recordings, Live Streaming on platforms such as YouTube or Twitch, playing on your survival world and being able to see cobwebs properly despite it being snowy or in a snow biome .
